modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble making a Gantt chart in Excel 2016

full_description_text: So, I was trying to figure out how to make this Gantt chart thing in Excel, you know, the one that looks like a bar chart? I opened up Excel 2016 and thought it would be easy, but I just couldn't get it to work right. I mean, I clicked around a lot and nothing happened, and it’s super frustrating because I really need this for my project. Can someone help me out with this?
short_description: Trouble making a Gantt chart in Excel 2016
